hero.philosophical1: That sense of dissonance is not a mistake.
hero.philosophical2: The void is not emptiness. It is space for becoming.
hero.philosophical3: You never belonged to the ordinary — not from the beginning.
hero.cta: This will become part of you.
hero.emotion1: For a long time, you have carried something words could not hold. This work gives place to what cannot be said.
hero.emotion2: Between silence and noise, there exists a frequency only you can hear. This is its form.
hero.emotion3: The world demanded you conform. This exists for the moment you chose to dissolve.
hero.identity1: For those who find no place in this world.
hero.identity2: For those who exist between words.
hero.identity3: For those who refuse comfort and choose truth.
hero.philosophyBlock: Not a sale — a decision. Each piece is numbered and will not be reproduced. TCDA exists at the intersection of wearable objects and the record of emotion.

product.details: Each piece is assigned an individual serial number. This artwork will not be restocked. What you wear becomes part of the archive.
product.notesItem1: Colors may vary slightly from the original depending on your monitor settings and lighting conditions.
product.notesItem2: As this item is produced overseas, minor scuffs or dents on the packaging may occasionally occur.

size.guideNote: Measurements in cm. If you are between sizes, we recommend sizing up.
size.label: Size

checkout.shippingReturnsText: Orders are fulfilled within 2–5 business days via Printful. Delivery typically takes 5–10 business days depending on your region. Returns are accepted within 14 days for defective or incorrect items. Return shipping costs for non-defective items remain the responsibility of the customer.

order.confirmedMessage: A confirmation has been sent to your email. This piece is now part of the archive.

faq.a1: Orders are dispatched within 2–5 business days and typically arrive within 5–10 business days.
faq.q2: Do you accept returns or exchanges?
faq.a2: Returns are accepted within 14 days for defective items. One size exchange per order is available.
faq.a3: For a relaxed fit, we recommend sizing up. Our model is 180 cm tall and wears a size M.

sizeGuide.title: Size Guide
sizeGuide.pageIntro: All measurements in cm (toggle available). Find your fit using the guide below.
sizeGuide.measureChest: Measure around the fullest part of your chest, keeping the tape horizontal.
sizeGuide.measureLength: Measure from the highest point of the shoulder down to the hem.
sizeGuide.measureShoulder: Measure from shoulder seam to shoulder seam across the back.
sizeGuide.measureSleeve: Measure from the shoulder seam down to the cuff.
sizeGuide.faq1q: How do I find my size?
sizeGuide.faq1a: Compare your body measurements to our size chart. If between sizes, size up for a relaxed fit or size down for a fitted look.
sizeGuide.faq2q: What is the difference between body measurements and garment measurements?
sizeGuide.faq2a: Body measurements are yours. Garment measurements are the actual dimensions of the piece. The difference is the ease.
sizeGuide.faq3q: I'm between sizes. What should I do?
sizeGuide.faq3a: For oversized or relaxed fits, size down. For slim fits, size up. When in doubt, refer to the model info on the product page.
sizeGuide.faq4q: Do the sizes run large or small?
sizeGuide.faq4a: Sizing varies by product type. Check the fit label on each product page for guidance.
sizeGuide.faq5a: One size exchange per order is available. Contact us within 14 days of receipt.
sizeGuide.faq6a: Measurements are taken flat and may vary ±1–2 cm due to production tolerances.
sizeGuide.faq7a: A slim fit follows the body closely. We recommend sizing up if you prefer more ease.
sizeGuide.faq8a: Oversized pieces are intentionally large. The silhouette is designed to fall away from the body.
sizeGuide.faq9q: Do you offer sizing guidance for unisex pieces?
sizeGuide.faq9a: Unisex pieces are sized to fit all bodies. Check the model info on the product page for reference.
sizeGuide.faq10q: Are measurements in cm or inches?
sizeGuide.faq10a: Both are available. Use the toggle on the size guide to switch between cm and inches.
sizeGuide.faq11q: What if the size guide is not yet available for a product?
sizeGuide.faq11a: We are adding size guides for all products. Check back soon, or contact us for guidance.
sizeGuide.faq12q: How should I care for my piece?
sizeGuide.faq12a: Machine wash cold, gentle cycle. Do not tumble dry. Iron inside out on low heat.
sizeGuide.measurementVariationNote: Slight variation (±1–2 cm) may occur due to production tolerances.

fit.slimNote: Sits close to the body. Size up if you prefer room to move.
fit.regularNote: True to size. Relaxed through the chest and body.
fit.relaxedNote: Loose silhouette. Falls away from the body. Size down if you prefer a fitted look.
fit.oversizedNote: Intentionally oversized. Designed to drape. Size down for a regular silhouette.
